commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5631c9d4c0ea23c56541cec837d467b4b09dc648)
commands.review_summary:
The PR exports Darwin/macOS OS-label helpers from `src/infra/os-summary.ts` and switches CLI, embedded attempt, and compaction runtime prompt OS metadata to use them.

PR surface: Source +28. Total +28 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main still feeds `os.release()` into the three runtime prompt producers, and the linked report provides macOS 26.5.1 versus Darwin 25.5.0 host evidence; I did not run a live Tahoe host in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor proof and maintainer canonical-branch selection are needed before repair or merge; automation cannot supply the external macOS proof for this branch.

target.title: fix(os): use sw_vers for macOS version on Darwin instead of os.release()
target.author: sunlit-deng

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
